zh.Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾帕特勒 布里奇
zh.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke於大約1435年出生在英國越可爾。他於大約1459年與Lady Joane Mauleverer在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1498年4月25日在英國越可爾帕特勒 布里奇享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke于大约1435年出生在英国越可爾。他于大约1459年与Lady Joane Mauleverer在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1498年4月25日在英国越可爾帕特勒 布里奇享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yorke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke was born about 1435, in Yorkshire, England. He married Lady Joane Mauleverer about 1459, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 25 April 1498, in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke est né environ 1435, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il a épousé Lady Joane Mauleverer environ 1459, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1498, à Pateley Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke wurde um 1435 in Yorkshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1459 in England Lady Joane Mauleverer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 25. April 1498 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke è nato il circa 1435 nel Yorkshire, England. Lui sposato Lady Joane Mauleverer circa 1459, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 25 aprile 1498, nel Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorkeは約1435年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。約1459年にイギリスでLady Joane Maulevererと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1498年4月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプアテリー ブリッジで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke(은)는 대략 1435년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국에서 Lady Joane Mauleverer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1498년 4월 25일 영국 요르크실르 패텔이 브리지에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Lady Joane Mauleverer aproximadamente 1459, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1498, em Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke родился около 1435 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joane Mauleverer около 1459 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 25 апреля 1498 г. в местности пэители бридж, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Yorke nació aproximadamente 1435, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Lady Joane Mauleverer aproximadamente 1459, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 25 de abril de 1498, en Pateley Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
